question: Какой средний результат участников в соревновании House Price?
expected_sql: SELECT AVG(lr.score) FROM competition c JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id WHERE c.title ILIKE '%House Price%'

question: Топ 5 участников по лучшему результату среди соревнований по регрессии
expected_sql: SELECT u.username, lr.score FROM task_type tt JOIN competition c ON c.task_type_id = tt.task_type_id JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id JOIN user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE tt.code = 'regression' ORDER BY lr.score DESC LIMIT 5

question: Какие соревнования организовала alice?
expected_sql: SELECT c.title FROM competition c JOIN "user" u ON u.user_id = c.organizer_id WHERE u.username = 'alice'

question: Сколько участий в каждом соревновании?
expected_sql: SELECT c.title, COUNT(p.participation_id) FROM competition c JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id GROUP BY c.title ORDER BY COUNT(p.participation_id) DESC

question: Список всех соревнований с типом задачи classification
expected_sql: SELECT c.title FROM task_type tt JOIN competition c ON c.task_type_id = tt.task_type_id WHERE tt.code = 'classification'

question: Активные соревнования с количеством участников
expected_sql: SELECT c.title, COUNT(p.participation_id) FROM competition c LEFT JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id WHERE c.status = 'active' GROUP BY c.title ORDER BY COUNT(p.participation_id) DESC

question: Средний score по каждой метрике оценки
expected_sql: SELECT m.name, AVG(lr.score) AS avg_score FROM metric m JOIN competition_config cc ON cc.metric_id = m.metric_id JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = cc.competition_id JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id GROUP BY m.name

question: Пользователи без участия ни в одном соревновании
expected_sql: SELECT u.username FROM user u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM participation p WHERE p.user_id = u.user_id)

question: Какой лимит отправок в день у соревнования House Price?
expected_sql: SELECT cc.max_daily_submissions FROM competition c JOIN competition_config cc ON cc.competition_id = c.competition_id WHERE c.title ILIKE '%House Price%'

question: Победитель (1-е место) в каждом завершённом соревновании — имя участника и его лучший результат
expected_sql: SELECT c.title, u.username, lr.score FROM (SELECT lr.participation_id, lr.score, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.competition_id ORDER BY lr.score DESC) AS rnk FROM leaderboard_row lr JOIN participation p ON p.participation_id = lr.participation_id JOIN competition c ON c.competition_id = p.competition_id WHERE c.status = 'finished') ranked JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = ranked.participation_id JOIN participation p ON p.participation_id = lr.participation_id JOIN competition c ON c.competition_id = p.competition_id JOIN user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE ranked.rnk = 1

question: Соревнования у которых суммарный объём датасетов превышает 100 МБ и при этом участников не менее пяти
expected_sql: SELECT c.title, SUM(fa.size_bytes) AS total_bytes, COUNT(DISTINCT p.participation_id) AS participants FROM competition c JOIN dataset d ON d.competition_id = c.competition_id JOIN file_artifact fa ON fa.dataset_id = d.dataset_id JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id GROUP BY c.title HAVING SUM(fa.size_bytes) > 104857600 AND COUNT(DISTINCT p.participation_id) >= 5
